scores.notes: Minor OCR errors like '15261im' instead of '1526lm', '4000K' instead of '4000K', '180°' instead of '180°', '32°C to 8°C' instead of '-32°C to 8°C', '5y years' instead of '5 years', 'High-efficiencyl' instead of 'High-efficiency', 'compacts' instead of 'compact', '3y years' instead of '3 years', 'professional-gradel' instead of 'professional-grade', 'commercial andi industrial' instead of 'commercial and industrial'. The table structure is well-preserved, and numeric data is mostly accurate with a few minor character recognition issues.
